name: outbox.build_pull_request
description: Build a provider-agnostic draft pull-request packet and outbox entry from native scafld surfaces.

base.description: Base ref for the draft pull request.

branch.description: Explicit head branch for provider publication.

current_branch.description: Current git branch packet from git.current_branch.

fix_bundle.description: Bounded fix bundle used to derive the governed file list for provider publication.

harness_context.description: Optional captured harness context containing signal and decision state.

operational_policy.description: Optional runx.operational_policy.v1 packet used for request-time admission.

outbox_entry.description: Optional current pull_request outbox entry when refreshing an existing draft.

policy_action.description: Operational policy action, defaults to issue-to-pr.

repo_context.description: Bounded repository context used for reviewer context and quality gates.

repo_snapshot.description: Structured repository snapshot used for reviewer context and quality gates.

runner_id.description: Operational policy runner id for request-time admission.

source_id.description: Operational policy source id for request-time admission.

source_thread_locator.description: Recoverable source-thread locator for request-time admission.

target_repo.description: Intended repository slug when the caller already knows it.

task_id.description: scafld task id that produced the completed engineering state.

thread.description: Optional hydrated thread that may already carry a pull_request outbox entry.

thread_body.description: Bounded source-thread body used for reviewer context and quality gates.

thread_locator.description: Canonical thread locator for the bounded harness.

thread_title.description: Canonical thread title when the caller already has one.
